mapper.select: SELECT p.province_code as provinceCode, p.province_name as provinceName, COUNT(CASE WHEN d.so2 > a.so2_max THEN 1 END) as so2ExceedCount FROM province p LEFT JOIN detection_data d ON p.province_code = d.province_code LEFT JOIN aqi_level a ON d.aqi_level_id = a.aqi_id GROUP BY p.province_code, p.province_name

SELECT p.province_code as provinceCode, p.province_name as provinceName, COUNT(CASE WHEN d.spm > a.spm_max THEN 1 END) as pm25ExceedCount FROM province p LEFT JOIN detection_data d ON p.province_code = d.province_code LEFT JOIN aqi_level a ON d.aqi_level_id = a.aqi_id GROUP BY p.province_code, p.province_name

SELECT p.province_code as provinceCode, p.province_name as provinceName, COUNT(CASE WHEN d.co > a.co_max THEN 1 END) as coExceedCount FROM province p LEFT JOIN detection_data d ON p.province_code = d.province_code LEFT JOIN aqi_level a ON d.aqi_level_id = a.aqi_id GROUP BY p.province_code, p.province_name

SELECT p.province_code as provinceCode, p.province_name as provinceName, COUNT(CASE WHEN d.aqi_value > a.aqi_max THEN 1 END) as aqiExceedCount FROM province p LEFT JOIN detection_data d ON p.province_code = d.province_code LEFT JOIN aqi_level a ON d.aqi_level_id = a.aqi_id GROUP BY p.province_code, p.province_name

SELECT a.aqi_id as level, a.chinese_explain as levelName, COUNT(d.id) as count, ROUND(COUNT(d.id) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM detection_data), 2) as percentage FROM aqi_level a LEFT JOIN detection_data d ON a.aqi_id = d.aqi_level_id GROUP BY a.aqi_id, a.chinese_explain ORDER BY a.aqi_id

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.detect_time, '%Y-%m') as month, COUNT(CASE WHEN d.aqi_value > a.aqi_max THEN 1 END) as exceedCount FROM detection_data d LEFT JOIN aqi_level a ON d.aqi_level_id = a.aqi_id WHERE d.detect_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(d.detect_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN d.aqi_value <= a.aqi_max THEN 1 END) as passCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN d.aqi_value > a.aqi_max THEN 1 END) as exceedCount FROM detection_data d LEFT JOIN aqi_level a ON d.aqi_level_id = a.aqi_id WHERE d.detect_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR)

SELECT 'province' as regionType, p.province_name as regionName, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT g.grid_id) * 100.0 / p.total_grids, 2) as coverageRate FROM province p LEFT JOIN grid g ON p.province_code = g.province_code GROUP BY p.province_code, p.province_name, p.total_grids
UNION ALL
SELECT 'city' as regionType, c.city_name as regionName, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT g.grid_id) * 100.0 / c.total_grids, 2) as coverageRate FROM city c LEFT JOIN grid g ON c.city_code = g.city_code GROUP BY c.city_code, c.city_name, c.total_grids
